loss_record.structural_divergence: void replaces native unit type: C void is a no-type fiction that cannot be instantiated as a value; the abstraction permits unit as a first-class type; C forbids void by-value semantics; workaround: wrapper struct or sentinel-based convention
loss_record.domain_narrowing: C cannot pass or return void by value; programs must wrap the realization in struct or use function-call convention; the abstraction's direct unit values narrow to wrapped or indirect patterns in C
loss_record.ub_introduction: none; void is not UB, only semantically empty
